NoResponse.description: Response envelope for successful operations with no payload.

notification-settings.description: Notification controls by conversation type and notification mode (alert, sound, and preview).

x-enum-descriptions.enabled: Enables the notification behavior for the setting.

x-enum-descriptions.disabled: Disables the notification behavior for the setting.

direct_message.description:
Toggles alert notifications for direct messages.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Direct message notifications are turned on.
  • disabled: Direct message notifications are turned off.

direct_message_sound.description:
Toggles sound for direct message notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Sound plays for direct message notifications.
  • disabled: Sound is muted for direct message notifications.

direct_message_preview.description:
Toggles message preview for direct message notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Message content is shown in the notification preview.
  • disabled: Message content is hidden in the notification preview.

channel.description:
Toggles alert notifications for channel messages.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Channel notifications are turned on.
  • disabled: Channel notifications are turned off.

channel_sound.description:
Toggles sound for channel message notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Sound plays for channel notifications.
  • disabled: Sound is muted for channel notifications.

channel_preview.description:
Toggles message preview for channel notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Message content is shown in the channel notification preview.
  • disabled: Message content is hidden in the channel notification preview.

group.description:
Toggles alert notifications for group messages.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Group notifications are turned on.
  • disabled: Group notifications are turned off.

group_sound.description:
Toggles sound for group message notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Sound plays for group notifications.
  • disabled: Sound is muted for group notifications.

group_preview.description:
Toggles message preview for group notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Message content is shown in the group notification preview.
  • disabled: Message content is hidden in the group notification preview.

atmentions.description:
Toggles alert notifications for @mention messages.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: @mention notifications are turned on.
  • disabled: @mention notifications are turned off.

atmentions_sound.description:
Toggles sound for @mention notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Sound plays for @mention notifications.
  • disabled: Sound is muted for @mention notifications.

atmentions_preview.description:
Toggles message preview for @mention notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Message content is shown in the @mention notification preview.
  • disabled: Message content is hidden in the @mention notification preview.

bot.description:
Toggles alert notifications for bot messages.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Bot notifications are turned on.
  • disabled: Bot notifications are turned off.

bot_sound.description:
Toggles sound for bot message notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Sound plays for bot notifications.
  • disabled: Sound is muted for bot notifications.

bot_preview.description:
Toggles message preview for bot notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Message content is shown in the bot notification preview.
  • disabled: Message content is hidden in the bot notification preview.

reactions.description:
Toggles alert notifications for message reactions.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Reaction notifications are turned on.
  • disabled: Reaction notifications are turned off.

reactions_sound.description:
Toggles sound for reaction notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Sound plays for reaction notifications.
  • disabled: Sound is muted for reaction notifications.

reactions_preview.description:
Toggles message preview for reaction notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Message content is shown in the reaction notification preview.
  • disabled: Message content is hidden in the reaction notification preview.

hashtags.description:
Toggles alert notifications for hashtag mentions.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Hashtag notifications are turned on.
  • disabled: Hashtag notifications are turned off.

hashtags_sound.description:
Toggles sound for hashtag notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Sound plays for hashtag notifications.
  • disabled: Sound is muted for hashtag notifications.

hashtags_preview.description:
Toggles message preview for hashtag notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Message content is shown in the hashtag notification preview.
  • disabled: Message content is hidden in the hashtag notification preview.

MT.description:
Toggles alert notifications for mentions and tags (MT).
Allowed values:
  • enabled: MT notifications are turned on.
  • disabled: MT notifications are turned off.

MT_sound.description:
Toggles sound for MT notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Sound plays for MT notifications.
  • disabled: Sound is muted for MT notifications.

MT_preview.description:
Toggles message preview for MT notifications.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Message content is shown in the MT notification preview.
  • disabled: Message content is hidden in the MT notification preview.

media-gallery-settings.description: Controls whether downloaded media is saved to the device gallery.

images.description:
Controls whether downloaded images are saved to the device gallery.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Downloaded images are automatically saved to the gallery.
  • disabled: Downloaded images are not saved to the gallery.

camera_captures.description:
Controls whether photos taken within the app are saved to the device gallery.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Camera captures are automatically saved to the gallery.
  • disabled: Camera captures are not saved to the gallery.

videos.description:
Controls whether downloaded videos are saved to the device gallery.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Downloaded videos are automatically saved to the gallery.
  • disabled: Downloaded videos are not saved to the gallery.

media-auto-download-settings.description: Controls automatic media download behavior based on media type or network mode.

images.description:
Controls automatic download behavior for image files.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Images are downloaded automatically.
  • disabled: Images are not downloaded automatically.
  • wifi: Images are downloaded automatically only when connected to Wi-Fi.
  • mobile: Images are downloaded automatically only when on mobile data.

videos.description:
Controls automatic download behavior for video files.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Videos are downloaded automatically.
  • disabled: Videos are not downloaded automatically.
  • wifi: Videos are downloaded automatically only when connected to Wi-Fi.
  • mobile: Videos are downloaded automatically only when on mobile data.

others.description:
Controls automatic download behavior for all other file types.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Other files are downloaded automatically.
  • disabled: Other files are not downloaded automatically.
  • wifi: Other files are downloaded automatically only when connected to Wi-Fi.
  • mobile: Other files are downloaded automatically only when on mobile data.

mobile-settings-response.description: Full mobile settings object returned by the GET endpoint.

update-mobile-settings-request.description: Provide only the settings to update. For nested settings, send the nested object with intended values.

av_noise_cancellation.description:
Controls noise cancellation during audio/video calls.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Noise cancellation is active.
  • disabled: Noise cancellation is turned off.

media_to_gallery.description: Controls whether downloaded media is saved to the device gallery.

conference_recording.description:
Controls whether conference call recording is allowed.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Conference recording is permitted.
  • disabled: Conference recording is not permitted.

last_seen.description:
Controls the visibility of the user's last seen status.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Last seen is visible to others.
  • disabled: Last seen is hidden from others.

file_summary.description:
Controls whether file summaries are shown for shared files.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: File summaries are displayed.
  • disabled: File summaries are hidden.

media_upload_quality.description:
Controls whether media is uploaded in high quality.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Media is uploaded at high quality.
  • disabled: Media is uploaded at reduced quality.

notification.description: Notification controls by conversation type and notification mode (alert, sound, and preview).

media_auto_download.description: Controls automatic media download behavior based on media type or network mode.

huddle_join_video_muted.description:
Controls whether the camera is muted by default when joining a huddle.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Camera is muted on huddle join.
  • disabled: Camera is active on huddle join.

av_hd_video.description:
Controls whether HD video is used during audio/video calls.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: HD video is active.
  • disabled: HD video is turned off.

chat_summary.description:
Controls whether chat summaries are shown for conversations.
Allowed values:
  • enabled: Chat summaries are displayed.
  • disabled: Chat summaries are hidden.
